case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS CHANG KYONG KUK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $645.99 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG KYONG KUK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-19-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF AUG-16-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG KYONG KUK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG KYONG KUK $215.33 PRINCIPAL, $36.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $251.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDG.TO DEF.RETURNED.PERSON MOVED OUT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG KYONG KUK $645.99 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $645.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO KYONG CHANG RETURNED NOT AT ADDRESS.
